Exposes.name: power_outage_count
Exposes.label: Power outage count
Exposes.description: Number of power outages (since last pairing)

Exposes.name: motion_sensitivity
Exposes.label: Motion sensitivity
Exposes.description: Presence Detection Sensitivity.

Exposes.name: battery
Exposes.label: Battery
Exposes.description: Remaining battery in %, can take up to 24 hours before reported

Exposes.name: voltage
Exposes.label: Voltage
Exposes.description: Voltage of the battery in millivolts

Exposes.name: presence
Exposes.label: Presence
Exposes.description: Indicates whether the device detected presence

Exposes.name: pir_detection
Exposes.label: Pir detection
Exposes.description: Indicates whether the PIR sensor detects motion (in mmWave + PIR mode after mmWave presence detection PIR sensors gets turned off so this attribute might change to false although the presence is detected).

Exposes.name: presence_detection_options
Exposes.label: Presence detection options
Exposes.description: Presence detection sensor type

Exposes.name: ai_interference_source_selfidentification
Exposes.label: Ai interference source selfidentification
Exposes.description: AI interference source self-identification switch, when enabled can identify fans, air conditioners and other interference sources

Exposes.name: ai_sensitivity_adaptive
Exposes.label: Ai sensitivity adaptive
Exposes.description: Adaptive sensitivity switch function.

Exposes.name: absence_delay_timer
Exposes.label: Absence delay timer
Exposes.description: Value for delay before the device reports absence when no presence is detected

Exposes.name: pir_detection_interval
Exposes.label: Pir detection interval
Exposes.description: Higher detection frequency results in higher accuracy but lower battery life.

Exposes.name: illuminance
Exposes.label: Illuminance
Exposes.description: Measured illuminance

Exposes.name: humidity
Exposes.label: Humidity
Exposes.description: Measured relative humidity

Exposes.name: temperature
Exposes.label: Temperature
Exposes.description: Measured temperature value

Exposes.name: spatial_learning
Exposes.label: Spatial learning
Exposes.description: Initiate AI Spatial Learning.

Exposes.name: restart_device
Exposes.label: Restart device
Exposes.description: Restarts the device.

Exposes.name: identify
Exposes.label: Identify
Exposes.description: Initiate device identification

Exposes.name: temp_&_humidity_sampling
Exposes.label: Temp & humidity sampling
Exposes.description: Sampling time frequency, increasing affects battery life. Setting to custom allows specifying period, interval & threshold.

Exposes.name: temp_&_humidity_sampling_period
Exposes.label: Temp & humidity sampling period
Exposes.description: How often temp & humidity readings are taken on the device when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: temp_reporting_interval
Exposes.label: Temp reporting interval
Exposes.description: Custom time interval for temperature data reporting.

Exposes.name: temp_reporting_threshold
Exposes.label: Temp reporting threshold
Exposes.description: Reporting will trigger as temperature change reaches this value when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: temp_reporting_mode
Exposes.label: Temp reporting mode
Exposes.description: Temperature reporting type when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: humidity_reporting_interval
Exposes.label: Humidity reporting interval
Exposes.description: Custom time interval for humidity data reporting.

Exposes.name: humidity_reporting_threshold
Exposes.label: Humidity reporting threshold
Exposes.description: Reporting will trigger as humidity change reaches this value when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: humidity_report_mode
Exposes.label: Humidity report mode
Exposes.description: Humidity reporting type when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: light_sampling
Exposes.label: Light sampling
Exposes.description: Sampling time frequency, increasing affects battery life. Setting to custom allows specifying period, interval & threshold.

Exposes.name: light_sampling_period
Exposes.label: Light sampling period
Exposes.description: How often illumination readings are taken on the device when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: light_reporting_interval
Exposes.label: Light reporting interval
Exposes.description: Custom interval for illumination data reporting.

Exposes.name: light_reporting_threshold
Exposes.label: Light reporting threshold
Exposes.description: Reporting will trigger as illumination percentage change reaches this value when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: light_report_mode
Exposes.label: Light report mode
Exposes.description: illumination reporting type when in custom mode.

Exposes.name: track_target_distance
Exposes.label: Track target distance
Exposes.description: Initiate current target distance tracking.

Exposes.name: target_distance
Exposes.label: Target distance
Exposes.description: Distance to the detected target

Exposes.name: detection_range
Exposes.label: Detection range
Exposes.description: Specifies the range that is being detected. Requires mmWave radar mode. Press the on-device button to wake the device up and refresh its' settings.

Exposes.name: detection_range_composite
Exposes.label: Detection range composite
Exposes.description: Specifies the detection range using set of boolean settings.

Exposes.name: led_disabled_night
Exposes.label: Led disabled night
Exposes.description: Enables/disables LED indicator at night

Exposes.name: schedule_start_time
Exposes.label: Schedule start time
Exposes.description: LED disable schedule start time (HH:MM format)

Exposes.name: schedule_end_time
Exposes.label: Schedule end time
Exposes.description: LED disable schedule end time (HH:MM format)

Exposes.name: linkquality
Exposes.label: Linkquality
Exposes.description: Link quality (signal strength)
